name: sister-poc-worker-a
description: Worker A — Local HTTP + WebSocket Bridge Server. Sister PoC research artifact for Anthropic HackerOne VDP only.

scripts.test:smoke: node -e "const h=require('http');let d='';const r=h.get('http://127.0.0.1:'+process.env.PORT,'8787','/health',res=>{res.on('data',c=>d+=c);res.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);if(j.status==='ok')console.log('Smoke test PASS');else{console.error('Smoke test FAIL',j);process.exit(1);}});});r.on('error',e=>{console.error('Server not running:',e.message);process.exit(1);});"

notes.purpose: HackerOne VDP research artifact only. Not for distribution. Single-operator localhost.
